about.title: Front-End
about.bio: Frontend Developer with over a year and a half of experience in high-pressure environments, specialized in transforming complex requirements into robust and scalable interfaces. I have led modular architectures, payment integrations with Stripe and RevenueCat, KYC and RBAC systems, collaborating closely with UX/UI, Backend and Mobile teams.
